Appearances:
Plaintiff S.F. Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kim Reeder.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for plaintiff
Defendant Sherrie Drake is present.
Attorney Trenton Montgomery representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Sep-10-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
